title: Faculty Feedback Form
description: Provide feedback to help faculty members enhance the learning experience.

questions.label: Overall, how would you rate the faculty member's effectiveness in fostering a positive learning environment?
What specific actions or changes could the faculty member implement to enhance your learning experience?
How clear and understandable were the faculty member's explanations of course material?
Did you feel the faculty member was generally accessible and supportive when you needed assistance?
What were the faculty member's greatest strengths or most positive contributions to your learning?
